create_message_with_text: create a Message with role user and add text content using add_text
add_image_to_message: add an image part to a Message using base64 data or a URL
add_tool_call_to_message: add a tool call part to an assistant Message with a tool name and arguments
add_tool_result_to_message: add a tool result part to a Message with output and optional error
convert_message_to_llm_format: convert a Message to LLM API format using to_llm_format for user assistant or system roles
